description_long: This object is a classic steam locomotive with a robust, elongated body painted primarily in dark green and black, accented by red trim along the edges and around the front. The locomotive features a large, cylindrical boiler with two prominent smokestacks and a headlamp at the front, as well as a cowcatcher painted in red. The cab is boxy with visible window frames and sits at the rear, while the undercarriage displays a set of large, spoked driving wheels and smaller leading wheels. The side panels are detailed with metallic textures and subtle gold striping, and the roof of the cab is flat and solid. The overall design is reminiscent of early 20th-century steam engines commonly used for freight or passenger service in urban and rural settings.
description: A classic steam locomotive with a dark green and black body, red accents, large wheels, and a boxy cab at the rear. Features include two smokestacks, a headlamp, and a red cowcatcher.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the locomotive, including the cab, boiler, wheels, and red cowcatcher.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the headlamp, cowcatcher, and the two smokestacks aligned along the top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the wheels, boiler, and cab details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the cab and the flat roof, with the coupling mechanism visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: spaced rectangular windows on the cab
